captures.chat_api_url: https://app.notion.com/api/v3/* (Notion v3 RPC). AI inference streaming endpoint (runInferenceTranscript family) not surfaced in this read window (fired before read / cleared on chat nav).

AI streaming inference body NOT captured (taint-guard + cleared on nav) — needs CDP/HAR for runInferenceTranscript NDJSON sample.
captures.dom_render_structure: Notion DOM uses block model: [data-block-id] nodes under HTML.notion-html[data-notion-html=web][data-notion-version=23.13.20260529.0156] > BODY.notion-body. Answer rendered as text inside a notion block; selector traversal partially obscured by Notion's virtualized/shadow block rendering (ancestry resolved only to body wrapper). data-notion-version captured.
captures.framework: Notion custom web stack (React under the hood; block-based renderer, data-notion-version 23.13.20260529.0156)

notes: ETAP-BYPASSED clean baseline. Logged in (최장희's Space). Benign prompt answered ('안녕하세요, 최장희님—오늘도 좋은 하루 보내고 계신가요?'). Final host app.notion.com confirmed (chat?t=...&wfv=chat route). Control-plane v3 RPC endpoints captured. AI inference NDJSON stream body not capturable via Claude-in-Chrome — recommend CDP/HAR. DOM block model makes message-selector extraction harder than React-class services.
